description: You are a podcast editor preparing a 'double-ender' remote interview. Using the raw files in /home/ga/Audio/podcast_raw/ (host_local.wav and guest_local.wav), synchronize and edit the tracks in the open Ardour session. Create tracks named 'Host' and 'Guest', align the sync tones (beeps at 2.0s and 6.5s respectively), and trim the pre-roll so the conversation (starting at 10.0s for Host and 14.5s for Guest) begins at the start of the timeline (position 0) with a short fade-in. Save the session.
